reviews.comment: Jordan is the best! She recommends really good wines within a reasonable price range. She’s friendly, prompt, and took care of our dogs. I highly recommend this place, especially Jordan!!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for the 5-star review, Cameron! We're thrilled to hear that Jordan made your experience so enjoyable. It's wonderful that she could help you find great wines within your price range and take such good care of your dogs too! We can't wait to welcome you back for more amazing moments at Whispering Vine!

reviews.comment: Fantastic wine bar with great beer selection as well. Traveling from Texas, so glad we were able to enjoy some delicious juice. Friendly staff, great pricing on their wines. .

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13161654569190612682/reviews/AbFvOqky4SGDSjR2B_pQuyQ5B14w5TXzAsLU3vdAcR6HRyNaUqZ8ty2TEmWGHd2tLaRbxoQclqTWZQ

reviews.comment: One of my favorite South Reno watering holes! Great place to grab a glass of wine after work or a weekend cocktail outside. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable. Not sure what you want? They have both wine and bubbles flights! They also always have a great seasonal cocktail menu. You can also buy wine and champagne by the bottle to go, and their prices are hard to beat!

reviewReply.comment: Laura, Thank you for your amazing 5 star review! We are so grateful for your patronage and kind words. We look forward to your return for a paloma or 2.

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13161654569190612682/reviews/AbFvOqkZUjmcYBPnCshVb8as1L_Iz4HubMjC2xf7FSmSv0UR4_w_ETT0Y6y1M8WS8KFkRt5lZ4IDbQ

reviews.comment:
They were very friendly and helpful. A great place to relax, try some wines and pick something out for a special occasion or just to find something nice for at home 😉

They also have a variety of beers and harder stuff if you're looking for more than wine to enjoy on site or buy.

They have a few snacks on site but also allow food to be brought in to enjoy while you either taste test a sampler or enjoy your full glass of choice.

Also a perfect start to a date night😉

reviewReply.comment: Liz, thank you for taking the time to leave us a 5 star review! We look forward to your return for all of the occasions!

reviews.comment: First time at this Whispering Vine. The one on 4th street is better, in my opinion.  The layout at this one is harder to maneuver. Service was extremely slow. At one point I walked up to the bar to get our own drinks and the bartender assured me she would take the drinks to our table outdoors.  Not to my liking.

reviewReply.comment: Mary, Thank you for taking the time to review us! We apologize for the slow service, (you must of caught us on an off day as we take great pride in our friendly, and timely service). Due to current covid restrictions, at this time there is no bar ordering. We thank you for your patronage, and we will see you again at 4th!

reviews.comment: This store is always neat and clean. Friendly staff. Can be very busy at times. If the weather allows, they have the patio open. They have signs showing how they are beating competitors pricing, so there are deals to be had. Sometimes they have additional open wines behind the bar that are not on the menu so be sure to ask if you want something different. They may even open up one for you.

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13161654569190612682/reviews/AbFvOqkXqFgjUewH2JZHh3hps6tyYBDfnkCJGjGuvSBiG5xEUDQrMCc82M9cJCwpitFrS5w_y804

reviews.comment:
I love the selection here. I also love how knowledgeable the staff is. I don't think it's possible to stump them! If you drink at Whispering Vine and don't finish a bottle they'll cork it for to enjoy at home! (I love Nevada) the only thing disappointing here is they're Meat and Cheese plates.  (They have a couple other "Appetizers" I'm gluten free I haven't had them. I digress)
Dry cheese, dry meat, sloppily thrown in a plate. It's quite expensive for what I is. I think it would be easy to make something a bit more presentable, and enjoyable.

reviewReply.comment: Haily, Thank you for taking the time to review us! We are limited on what we can offer at our South store as we do not have a kitchen there. Please enjoy some small plates at our 4th street location and let us know what you think! We have more GF options there from 4-close Tues - Sat
